title: Acadx: An Departmental ERP System
conference_full: International Journal of Innovative Research in Computer and Communication Engineering
abstract: A departmental ERP system for academic institutions enabling automated attendance tracking, score management, digital NOC processing, and AI-powered reporting. Designed to reduce administrative overhead and improve transparency across institutional hierarchies.

title: Auto Sentinel: Integrating Driver Behaviour Analysis, Eye-Face Authentication, Emotion Detection, and Anti-Hypnosis Features
abstract: An integrated driver safety system combining real-time driver behaviour analysis, eye-face biometric authentication, emotion detection, and anti-hypnosis alerting to enhance road safety and prevent accidents caused by driver fatigue or distraction.

title: AgriSense: Smart Agriculture Advisory System
conference_full: Software Engineering and Project Management Review Paper
abstract: A smart agriculture advisory system that leverages IoT sensor data and machine learning to provide real-time, context-aware agricultural recommendations to farmers, improving crop yield and resource efficiency.

title: SmartPlate: AI-Driven Demand Forecasting & Personalized Nutrition for Non-Funded Canteens
abstract: A comprehensive research paper on applying AI-driven demand forecasting and personalized nutrition recommendation systems to improve the operational efficiency and service quality of non-funded institutional canteens.
